source_pr.title: BR: update br  keep upstream
source_pr.body:
<!-- Thank you for contributing to TiDB!

PR Title Format:
1. pkg [, pkg2, pkg3]: what's changed
2. *: what's changed

-->

### What problem does this PR solve?

Problem Summary:

update br to latest with subtree upstream
### What is changed and how it works?

Proposal: [xxx](url) <!-- REMOVE this line if not applicable -->

What's Changed:

- 3b1308e89 lightning: evaluate all generated columns even if they are virtual (pingcap/br#1407)
- 1b0e54c2f lightning: check and restore pd scheduler even if our task failed (pingcap/br#1336)
-   073d3596c lightning: fix the bug that calculate unfinished ranges may miss some range (pingcap/br#1413)
-    82ff927df backup: refine backup log for tracing backup tasks (pingcap/br#1335)
-    e907562e8 lightning: make create table ddl compatible with clustered index (pingcap/br#1364)
 -   b6cab4b27 lightning: auto configure for parallel import (pingcap/br#1387)

### Check List <!--REMOVE the items that are not applicable-->

Tests <!-- At least one of them must be included. -->

- [ ] Unit test
- [ ] Integration test


### Release note <!-- bugfixes or new feature need a release note -->

```release-note
None
```

root_cause_explanation: INSUFFICIENT_EVIDENCE: This PR updates the BR subtree to keep in sync with upstream changes. The available evidence does not indicate a targeted flaky-test stabilization change with a clear intermittent failure signature, so we conservatively classify it as insufficient evidence.
fix_pattern: N/A (insufficient evidence; no targeted stabilization change identified).
